title: EC Apotheosis Compat
description: add compatability between Expanded combat and Apotheosis
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-apotheosis-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Apotheosis Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feda4075323ffb89fc44102b1dfbce039dbfa3ac_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis). ### adds affix drops and loot for: Expanded Combat vanilla material's weapons, shields, and gauntlets > Gauntlets can now gain perks from apotheosis's standard gems ### Custom gems At the moment only one is added. #### The Heartstealer This gem provides the same heart stealing ability of The Heart Stealer Weapon. This gem does not drop from mobs nor can it be found in chests. You can only get it by taking the gem out of The Heartstealer via the normal apotheosis provided means. you can also now enchant Solidified Purity to get Superior Purity. This is 10 times as potent as Solidified Purity at healing the heartstealer curse. \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
